title: Shipwreck on the Pirate Islands
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's family survives a plane crash on a pirate island, dodges sharks and ghosts, and finds a golden pirate ship! 🏴‍☠️

q.en: Where does Thea insist the family vacation instead of the relaxing Soft Squeak Resort?
q.zh: 蒂奥坚持全家去哪里度假，而不去轻松惬意的软吱吱度假村？

explain.en: Thea scoffs at Soft Squeak as 'for senior citizens' and drags everyone to the wild Pirate Islands with tigers, pythons, and tarantulas.
explain.zh: 蒂奥嘲笑软吱吱度假村是“给老年人去的”，硬把大家带到了有老虎、巨蟒和狼蛛的野外海盗群岛。

q.en: Who is the bizarre pilot nicknamed 'Bouncer'?
q.zh: 那个外号叫“保恩瑟”的古怪飞行员真名是什么？

explain.en: The pilot introduces himself as Rough Rat Ricky, but everyone calls him Bouncer; he wears purple shorts, a neon shirt with red hearts, and a 'SCRAM!' medal.
explain.zh: 飞行员自称“粗野鼠里基”，但大家都叫他保恩瑟；他穿着紫色短裤、带红心的荧光黄衬衫，还挂着一块写有“滚开”的金牌。

q.en: What causes the hydroplane to crash into the sea?
q.zh: 是什么导致水上飞机坠入大海的？

explain.en: The control tower radios that a tornado is headed right for them, and the plane is blown into the deep blue waves.
explain.zh: 控制塔通过无线电警告说一场龙卷风正朝他们扑来，飞机被狂风掀翻，栽进了深蓝色的大海。

q.en: On which island do the mice end up after the crash?
q.zh: 老鼠们坠机后最终流落到了哪座岛上？

options.en: Fin's Revenge according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 芬恩的复仇岛（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo recognizes the island from his guidebook: Thump Flop, home of the 'plop birds' (Plob birds).
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩从旅行指南里认出了这座岛：砰啪岛，正是那种会“啪嗒”掉鸟粪的鸟儿（普鲁伯鸟）的家园。

q.en: What does Geronimo find when he bites an oyster and chips his tooth?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩咬开一只牡蛎、把牙硌掉一块时，发现了什么？

explain.en: He spits out a horrifying crunch and finds a glittering white pearl in his paw — making the family 'rich!'
explain.zh: 他吐出一声吓人的“嘎嘣”，却在手心里发现了一颗闪闪发光的白色珍珠——一家人顿时“发财啦！”

q.en: Who saves Geronimo from the giant shark by cannonballing onto its back?
q.zh: 是谁用“炸弹式”跳水的姿势砸到鲨鱼背上，把杰罗尼摩从大鲨鱼口中救下的？

explain.en: Bouncer does a cannonball off a high cliff onto the shark's back; the shark closes its eyes and starts snoring.
explain.zh: 保恩瑟从高处来了一个“炸弹式”跳水，正好砸在鲨鱼背上；鲨鱼闭上眼睛，居然打起了呼噜。

q.en: What are the names of the two crooked treasure hunters?
q.zh: 那两个狡猾的寻宝贼分别叫什么名字？

options.en: Cap E. Tan and Chatterbox Charlie
Blackbeard and Calico Jack according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 黑胡子和花布杰克（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The thin captain is Cap E. Tan and the round, chatty one is Chatterbox Charlie; they sneak ashore with a treasure map.
explain.zh: 瘦瘦的船长叫船长E·坦，圆滚滚又爱说话的那个叫唠叨鬼查理；他们拿着藏宝图偷偷上了岸。

q.en: How does Bouncer scare the treasure hunters off the island?
q.zh: 保恩瑟是用什么办法把寻宝贼吓跑的？

options.en: Throwing crabs at them according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 朝他们扔螃蟹（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Rolling in quartz sand to look like a glittering white ghost
options.zh: 在石英沙里打了滚，扮成一个闪闪发光的白色幽灵

explain.en: Bouncer rolls in the quartz crystal sand, then howls 'SCRAM! MOVE IT! GET LOST!' like a ghost, and the crooks flee.
explain.zh: 保恩瑟在石英沙里滚了一身，然后像幽灵一样嚎叫“滚开！快走！消失！”，两个坏蛋吓得划船逃走了。

q.en: What is the name of the golden pirate ship they find in the underground cavern?
q.zh: 他们在地下洞穴里发现的那艘黄金海盗船叫什么名字？

explain.en: At the center of the crystal cavern sits an enormous galleon named TREASURE — and everything on it is made of gold.
explain.zh: 在晶莹的洞穴正中央停着一艘巨大的帆船，名字叫“宝藏号”——而且船上的一切都是用黄金打造的。

q.en: What does Geronimo discover about his family by reading Silverpaw's ship's log?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩读了银爪的航海日志后，发现自己家族有什么秘密？

options.en: He owns the island according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他是那座岛的主人（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He has pirate blood — he is related to Silverpaw
options.zh: 他流着海盗的血——和银爪是亲戚

explain.en: The log shows his great-great-great-great-grandfather's cousin was the pirate Silverpaw, so Geronimo has pirate blood.
explain.zh: 日志显示，他高祖父的高祖父的堂兄弟正是海盗银爪，所以杰罗尼摩体内流着海盗的血。
